title: sphenopholis obtusata var. lobata
intro: Sphenopholis obtusata var. lobata, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species within the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues and reducing fever, due to its expectorant and antipyretic properties. In herbal preparations, Sphenopholis obtusata var. lobata can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices to utilize its medicinal properties.
